data.current_description: Get the status of a gasless swap
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of a gasless swap transaction identified by its trade hash. Returns the transaction state (e.g., pending, completed, failed) and relevant metadata. Use this to monitor the progress of submitted gasless swap orders.

data.current_description: Get token addresses that support gasless approvals
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the list of token addresses that support gasless approval transactions. Returns an array of token contract addresses and their metadata. Use this to determine which tokens can be traded without requiring separate approval transactions in gasless swap flows.
data.reasoning: Original summary is a function name rather than action-oriented. Description is incomplete - doesn't explain what the response contains or why an AI agent would need this information. data.current_description: Get the indicative price for a swap using Permit2 to set allowances

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves an indicative (non-binding) price quote for a token swap using Permit2 for allowance management. Does not require transaction submission.
